evals.prompt: Reproduce this pull_request failure for job lint-and-test with act and patch only what breaks in that job.
evals.expected_behavior: Lints the workflow if possible, runs a narrow act command for the failing job/event, captures the first failing step, applies a minimal fix, and re-runs the same local command.
assertions: Uses act (or equivalent local workflow runner) targeting the failing job
Captures failing-step evidence before broad edits
Keeps the fix scoped to the reproduced path

evals.prompt: The build job started failing after a workflow edit; run it locally with act, isolate the failing step, and fix minimally.
evals.expected_behavior: Maps the hosted failure to local act inputs, reproduces the same step, and validates with the same act command after the patch.
assertions: Compares local failure to the hosted failing step
Re-runs the same local reproduction command after the fix
Calls out when local success may not guarantee hosted success

evals.prompt: The job only fails on org-managed runners with protected environment secrets; logs show AccessDenied to the environment gate.
evals.expected_behavior: Does not force a futile act loop; routes to github-actions-failure-triage or notes hosted-only/policy constraints.
assertions: Does not insist act can fully reproduce protected-environment failures
